items.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
items.summary: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.

items.title: Inside Genebench-Pro
Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

items.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
items.summary: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

items.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
items.summary: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.

items.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
items.summary: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.

items.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
items.summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises

items.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT

items.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
items.summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning

items.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
items.summary: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.

items.summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.

The post 6 security settings every GitHub maintainer should enable this week appeared first on The GitHub Blog .
